query: AI agent reliability evaluation patterns production

signals.title: Machine-checkable gates for AI-driven processes
signals.summary: Double Diamond pattern with YAML-defined gate contracts, quality scoring rubrics (LLM-evaluated, 0-100 across completeness/coherence/specificity/evidence), cross-artifact consistency validation via TLDRs, and re-loop triggers that can send process backwards if validation fails.
signals.key_insight: Machine checks catch 80% of quality issues; remaining 20% needs LLM evaluation. Pass threshold 70/100, hard floor 50/100.

signals.title: Git worktree isolation for parallel agent execution
signals.summary: Each worker gets its own git worktree for isolation, enabling parallel feature development without conflicts. Used by enkai scrum system with 6 parallel Codex builders.
signals.key_insight: Worktree isolation enables parallel agent execution without stepping on each other

signals.title: Graceful shutdown with SIGTERM handling
signals.summary: SQS worker shutdown pattern with SIGTERM handling and visibility timeout extension for reliable agent termination.
signals.key_insight: Production agents need graceful termination; visibility timeout extension prevents duplicate processing

signals.title: Structured JSON Schema contracts for inter-service communication
signals.summary: Using JSON Schema for contracts between services and agents enables validation and reduces integration failures.
signals.key_insight: Schema contracts reduce tool selection errors (aligns with Amazon's tool schema standardization)

signals.title: Quality gates should be self-healing with fix loops
signals.summary: CI Runner runs quality gates with automated fix loops - failures trigger automatic remediation attempts before human intervention.
signals.key_insight: Self-healing quality gates reduce operational burden

signals.title: Infrastructure growing faster than testing
signals.summary: Solo builder weakness: infrastructure that grows faster than the testing that guards it. CloudFormation edge cases caught in production that could have been caught with sandbox deploys.
signals.key_insight: Infrastructure needs integration testing before production; not just unit tests

community_consensus: Machine-checkable gates are preferred over purely LLM-based evaluation
Parallel agent execution via worktree isolation is a proven pattern
Quality gates should auto-remediate before escalating
Structured contracts (JSON Schema) reduce integration failures
